'''Madis''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Agave-class picket ship|picket ship]] ''[[Folna]]'' during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1998-06-30 -->''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
